content_body:
My daughter (10 y/o) exclaimed, "It's so beautiful in this cabin, just like a fairytale!" We all agree that the cabin and the surroundings are enchanting. We relaxed, recharged, reconnected, and rejoiced. Thank you, thank you, thank you for sharing your magical home with us! We plan to visit again and again!

From their daughter: This wonderful cabin is a truly exquisite place to stay. It seems like its from a fairytale. The beautiful view of the Blue Ridge Mountains is an ever changing piece of art. All the enormous and breathtaking windows introduce an incredible amount of light into the rooms. Sitting around the crackling fire all together on the couch, we all agreed that it was very peaceful. Everything is so detailed and interesting to look at. I really enjoyed looking at all the different types of wood. In my opinion, this cabin feels very grand and inviting. I truly love this cabin and hope to come back. Thank you so much for giving us the chance to stay in this wonderful cabin.
title: We Were Enchanted!
